stemHtml: On an RNP 1 route A342 Z, the letter Z means all turns shall be within RNP tolerance of a tangential arc with a radius of…

options.a: 15 NM for turns between 30° and 90° at and below FL190.
options.b: 15 NM for turns between 30° and 90° at and above FL200.
options.c: 22.5 NM for turns between 30° and 90° at and above FL200.
options.d: 22.5 NM for turns between 30° and 90° at and below FL190.
